'''Jen''' was a teenaged [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] from [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]] who joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], she was one of the twenty-six Rebel resistance soldiers that were led by [[Morgan Katarn]] and participated in the missile team during [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec's]] attack.

Hidden behind some boulders at the [[Geothermal tap|G-Tap]] cave, she was replacing her companion [[Trol]]'s tube with [[SLM]], until one bound was hit by a laser beam, and were both killed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'' {{1st}}
